title: Oil Prices Surge Despite Record-Breaking Strategic Reserve Release
summary: Oil prices climbed sharply on Wednesday even after the International Energy Agency announced the largest coordinated release of strategic oil reserves in its history, underscoring the scale of supply concerns stemming from escalating tensions in the Middle East. title: Trump will decide whether U.S. participates in IEA release of oil reserves, Interior Secretary says
summary: The IEA is group of 32 advanced economies primarily in Europe, North America and northeast Asia. The U.S. is a member of the organization.

title: Social Security 2027 cost-of-living adjustment forecast may rise with high oil prices
summary: The Social Security cost-of-living adjustment for 2027 may be 1.7% to 2.8%, according to new estimates. But that could increase if inflation climbs higher.

title: China Stockpiles Soften the Blow of the Global Oil Shock
summary: The world’s top crude oil and LNG importer, China, is not as exposed and vulnerable to energy deliveries from the Middle East as one might think.
